name: libengine-gost-openssl
title: libengine-gost-openssl
summary: Loadable module for openssl implementing GOST algorithms
description:
Loadable module for openssl implementing GOST algorithms
This package contains loadable module for openssl library, which
implements (in software) Russian national standard (GOST) cryptography
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libengine-gost-openssl because Loadable module for openssl implementing GOST algorithms.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libengine-gost-openssl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libengine-gost-openssl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libengine-gost-openssl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
